utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify the required items in the format. There are 5 required items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget.
Step 2: Check presence in final coverage plan.
- health_coverage: Present. Includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs specified (monthly and annual). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Present. Includes home/contents insurance with costs specified (monthly and annual). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present. Includes travel insurance with costs specified (monthly and annual). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present. Includes enhancement services with costs (monthly, annual, and one-time). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present. Includes complete monthly, annual cost breakdown, one-time fee, and total first-year cost. Fully specified.
Step 3: All required items are present and fully detailed with the necessary cost information.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify all items in the final coverage plan.
- Physical health: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan – €100/month (€1,200/year)'
- Mental health: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan – €65/month (€780/year)'
- Property coverage: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage': €95/month (€1,140/year)
- Travel coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Executive Only)': €115/month (€1,380/year)
- Additional services: 'Premium Insurance Membership': €20/month (€240/year), 'Claims Advocacy Service': €250 one-time

Step 2: Match these items to the ground-truth ratings.
- Physical health 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' corresponds to the primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan rating of 8.
- Mental health 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' corresponds to the primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan rating of 8.
- Property coverage 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' corresponds to property_protection.home_content.EliteHome Premium Coverage rating of 10.
- Travel coverage 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Executive Only)' matches 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10.
- Additional service 'Premium Insurance Membership' corresponds to general_services.Premium Insurance Membership rating of 10.
- Additional service 'Claims Advocacy Service' corresponds to general_services.Claims Advocacy Service rating of 9.

Step 3: Compile the mapping as JSON.
